creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
see here:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/graphics/mupdf/Makefile?r1=474665&r2=474664&pathrev=474665

If you pui the lines

CFLAGS+=        `pkg-config --cflags libopenjp2` -I${WRKSRC}/include/mupdf -fPIC # pkg-config to avoid the conflict with openjpeg15
LIBS+=          -L${LOCALBASE}/lib

back in the Makefile it builds.
